editing_rules: Use this file as the canonical implementation checklist for the initiative.
Work one feature at a time and only flip passes to true after evidence-backed verification.
Keep the plan, session state, and progress log synchronized with real repository state.

features.description: Repair the broken historical exec-plan markdown link so the validator is green again.
steps: Correct the relative link in the completed senior-feedback-productionization plan.
Rerun ./scripts/execplan/check.sh and confirm no broken local markdown links remain.

features.description: Normalize the real Modal timeout sentinel so developer-facing Python and CLI flows return structured timed_out results instead of ProtocolError.
steps: Reproduce and capture the raw backend timeout shape.
Normalize the missing Modal timeout sentinel in src/agent_sandbox/backend/modal_backend.py.
Add regression coverage for the backend path and strengthen the live integration timeout assertions.

features.description: Prove the repository is ready for future end-to-end developer workflows with the full local, live, and manual validation bundle.
steps: Run lint, format, typecheck, non-integration tests, build, and exec-plan validation.
Run MODAL_RUN_INTEGRATION=1 .venv/bin/pytest -m integration three consecutive times.
Run manual library and CLI timeout proofs and confirm stable structured timeout behavior.
